---
title: "Sunlight in the Clouds;  Some Providences in a Life-time;  The Shoemaker’s Daughters"
---

## Sunlight in the Clouds;  Some Providences in a Life-time;  The Shoemaker’s Daughters
**Date:** 1852
**Imprint:** London: Mozley

### Notes

Another work entitled <i>Sunlight in the Clouds</i> is attributed by the <i>British Library Catalogue</i> to a Mrs Benson, but that seems to be a different book.  When <i>Sunlight in the Clouds was </i>published in <i>MP</i> (1851) it was signed H. L. C., and it seems possible that the works published by ‘the Author of <i>Sunlight in the Clouds’</i> are by Harriet Lucy Cox.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
